query: GFAP human dorsolateral prefrontal cortex marker

results.title: Neuroinflammation in the dorsolateral prefrontal cortex in elderly chronic schizophrenia
results.snippet: These altered processes in the dorsolateral prefrontal cortex (DLPFC) could contribute to the worsening of the deficits.

results.title: A molecular convergence in the triad of parkinson's disease, depressive disorder and gut health is revealed by the inflammation-miRNA axis
results.snippet: We analyzed the expression of a panel of inflammatory bowel disease (IBD)-associated miRNAs, key inflammatory markers, and glial response in postmortem brain tissue (dorsolateral prefrontal cortex and caudate nucleus) from patients with PD, DD, and matched healthy controls.

results.title: No preliminary evidence of differences in astrocyte density within the white matter of the dorsolateral prefrontal cortex in autism
results.snippet: We present the first study of astrocyte density and morphology within the white matter of the dorsolateral prefrontal cortex (DLPFC) in individuals with autism.

results.title: Coordinated gene expression of neuroinflammatory and cell signaling markers in dorsolateral prefrontal cortex during human brain development and aging
results.snippet: Age changes in expression of inflammatory, synaptic, and neurotrophic genes are not well characterized during human brain development and senescence.
